calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-30-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-30-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for a Default Prove-Up hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: E. Bura, CSR: Ron Sinclair..
Arnold Evje, Esq., for Plaintiff: Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc. Witness for plaintiff: Mendoza Hernandez, present, was sworn and examined.
No appearance by Defendant: David Cameron.
Exhibit 1 - Three day notice------------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the defaulted Defendant: David Cameron as follows:
Restitution and possession of the property located at 520 South Van Ness Ave. #385, San Francisco, CA.
Forfeiture of the rental agreement.
Back-Rents $1,205.00
Damages $469.80
Costs $195.00
Per diem $15.66, for a Total of $1,885.46
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibit and Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-24-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: ARNOLD EVJE FOR PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC.
NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT DAVID CAMERON

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OFF CALENDAR. TO PROCEED TO TRIAL.

COMMISSIONER:SUE KAPLAN; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; NOT REPORTED (218)
